title: Dutch Apple Chocolate Crumble
description: A twist on the classic apple crumble with a rich chocolate topping, perfect for a festive dessert.

ingredients.name: apples
ingredients.notes: mix of sweet and tart varieties

ingredients.name: chocolate chips
ingredients.notes: dark or milk chocolate, whichever you prefer

instructions: Peel, core, and slice the apples.
Mix the sliced apples with cinnamon and nutmeg in a large bowl.
Transfer the apple mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, brown sugar, and cold butter until crumbly.
Add the chocolate chips to the crumble topping and mix until well combined.
Spread the crumble topping evenly over the apple filling.
Bake for 40-45 minutes or until the topping is golden brown and the apples are tender.
If using crunchy oat topping, sprinkle over the crumble before baking.
Serve warm with vanilla ice cream or whipped cream, if desired.
